checks.name: syntax
checks.message: Both modified files parse cleanly as valid TypeScript/TSX. No syntax errors detected via manual inspection or tsc output.

checks.name: linting
checks.message: node_modules not installed in worktree; turbo/eslint unavailable. Manual scan found one intentional eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps on a run-once mount effect. No 'as any', no dangerouslySetInnerHTML, no eval().

checks.name: build
checks.message: node_modules not installed in worktree; pnpm build could not execute. TypeScript strict mode confirmed in tsconfig.base.json. Pre-existing tsc error unrelated to this diff (@cloudflare/workers-types).

checks.name: unit_tests
checks.message: No test files added or modified. ~961 lines of new code (BestTradesPanel, SettlementDrawer, parseBestTradeRows, buildBatchOrders) added with zero corresponding tests.

checks.name: coverage
checks.message: QUALITY.md requires 80% threshold. New code coverage is 0% — no tests cover new components or utility functions.

checks.name: schema
checks.message: No new typed artifacts introduced. Type assertions on order_data fields are typed (not 'any'), appropriate for D1-stored JSON. One non-null assertion (r.onchainMatch!) is guarded by a preceding type === 'onchain' branch check.

checks.name: touch_map
checks.message: No touch_map.writes found for task-007. Git diff shows 2 files modified, both within apps/web/src/app — consistent with task scope.

checks.name: property_tests
checks.message: property_based: optional per QUALITY.md. parseBestTradeRows and buildBatchOrders have non-trivial branching over unknown JSON shapes — property tests recommended but not required.
